name: property managers handling 10-20 rental units tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 rental units, inefficient rent collection causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent collection instead of manual rent collection via checks and cash.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers handling 10-20 rental units, inefficient rent collection causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent collection instead of manual rent collection via checks and cash.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual rent collection via checks and cash

one_liner: For property managers handling 10-20 rental units, inefficient rent collection causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent collection instead of manual rent collection via checks and cash.
